Requirements:
- Use YAML header:
  ---
  applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.tsx"
  ---
- Define strict TypeScript standards (no `any`, strict mode assumed, immutability, discriminated unions).
- Define React standards (functional components, hooks rules, explicit typing, small components).
- Include error handling and state management philosophy.
- Keep it production-grade.
- Structured with sections and bullet points.
- Avoid unnecessary verbosity.
